features: Convenient Design: Easy to tear perforations ensure continuous paper supply.
Quality Material: Made from high quality 100% recycled material for reliability and sustainability.
Dual Purpose: Functions as both centre feed and kitchen towel, offering superior absorption and minimizing visibility of stains and muck.

Hygienic and Space saving: From offices and restaurants to homes with kids and pets, these Blue Rolls offer convenience. They are more hygienic, save space and are strategically placed for quick hand cleaning.
Please note photos are for illustrative purposes, colours may vary slightly
